Solaire Case Study

Solaire Resort and Casino is a high class establishment in Manila's Entertainment City. We provided managed services to keep their digital infrastructure resilient under heavy load.

Stratpoint engineered a custom monitoring stack, deployed runbooks, and trained the in-house ops team. Outcomes included reduced incident MTTR and a more predictable release cadence.
